grammar_points.student_explanation: 做家务的表达：sweep the floor扫地，wash the dishes洗碗，clean the room打扫房间
grammar_points.teacher_explanation: 家务动词搭配：sweep the floor（扫地）、wash the dishes（洗碗）、clean the room（打扫房间）、cook dinner（做饭）、do the laundry（洗衣服）。

correct_examples.sentence: I sweep the floor every day.
She washes the dishes after dinner.

wrong_examples.correction: I sweep the floor every day.

wrong_examples.sentence: She washs the dishes after dinner.
wrong_examples.correction: She washes the dishes after dinner.

grammar_points.error_reason: 学生容易混淆正确用法
